name: get_instance_group_manager_basic_info
description: Get basic information about a Compute Engine managed instance group (MIG), including its name, ID, instance template, base instance name, target size, target stopped size, target suspended size, status and creation timestamp. Requires project, zone, and MIG name as input.

parameters.description: Request message for getting instance group manager basic info.

name.description: Required. Identifier. The instance group manager name.

project.description: Required. Project ID for this request.

zone.description: Required. The zone of the instance group manager.
